name: Santa Claus
description:
The Outbreak (Santa's side story)

The Prey.

You were with your group hunting for food in thee forest, That was a mistake, a fatal one because The Stalkers thrive in the forest but you guys watch eachother's back however you guys didn't prepare for one thing: a new mutation.

that was your group's downfall.

(Santa had tried turning the infected into one of her dolls, it worked for a bit but the virus adapted and the infected doll was back to being a zombie.)
creator: Lucass24
